name: 100 MG Bendamustine Hydrochloride For Injection
about: 100 MG Bendamustine Hydrochloride For Injection is a potent chemotherapy drug used to treat certain types of cancer, such as non-Hodgkins lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia. It is a liquid injection that is administered by a healthcare professional. This drug is sourced from India and is available in dosage guidelines as suggested by a doctor. Each injection contains 100mg of Bendamustine Hydrochloride. It is important to store this medicine in a cool place to maintain its efficacy.
